format_note: RESTRUCTURED 2026-05-31: 5 pieces/day, ALL 9:16 vertical video (Seedance 2, up to 15s). Dropped the old 3-gif/4-image mix (too low quality with our tools). Scene 1 = shared no-swap scenery; scenes 2+ = swap clips. Text cards may be added BETWEEN videos for context (free). frame_num is derived from each real stock clip's length at swap time, NOT hardcoded here.

1.name: Everyman — grey tee + jeans
1.iconic: plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve T-shirt + classic blue jeans, barefoot
1.subject: a Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair
1.weather: Days 1-3 overcast, no sun, cool, not dark; warms from Day 4

1.title: I wake up here
1.arc_beat: Wake (yawn/stretch -> eyes open, spooked) -> sit up, find the shredded paper -> walk scared through jungle, see the light -> out onto the cliff, vast ocean, hands behind head in disbelief.

pieces.prompt: (scenery cold-open, 9:16: stormy grey jungle island in a churning ocean; NO person; shared no-swap clip)

pieces.caption: Where... where am I?
pieces.prompt: Cinematic continuous shot, vertical 9:16, no cuts. It begins as a high wide view drifting down through a misty tropical jungle canopy at an overcast dawn, then the camera descends and pushes in from directly above toward a man lying flat on his back on the JUNGLE GROUND -- flat on the dirt and fallen leaves of the forest floor (not raised, not floating, fully on the ground), arms loose at his sides, fast asleep. He is a Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, clean-shaven, average build, wearing a plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve cotton T-shirt (plain round neckline, no buttons, no collar) and classic blue jeans, barefoot; warm brown skin on his face, neck, forearms and hands. The camera settles to a medium overhead view of him. He slowly stirs -- a soft inhale and yawn, his face scrunching, his arms stretching a little -- then his eyes flutter open and suddenly go WIDE with shock and confusion, and he turns his head sharply to the left, then to the right, taking in where he is. Soft flat overcast daylight, no sun, no golden light, cool and even, not dark, drifting mist. Shallow depth of field, cool desaturated cinematic grade, hyperrealistic, 8K.

pieces.caption: What is this...? Who wrote this?
pieces.prompt: Cinematic continuous shot, vertical 9:16, no cuts. A Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, clean-shaven, average build, wearing a plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve cotton T-shirt (plain round neckline, no buttons, no collar) and classic blue jeans, barefoot, pushes himself up from lying on the jungle floor into a SITTING position on the ground -- knees up and feet flat on the ground, NOT cross-legged, the natural way someone sits up right after waking. Warm brown skin on his face, neck, forearms and hands. Still shocked and disoriented, he looks around -- turning his head left, then right, then tilting his head up to take in the towering jungle around him, fear growing on his face. Then he notices a small torn, half-shredded, dirt-smudged scrap of old paper lying on the ground right beside him; he reaches over, picks it up, and holds it in front of him, brow furrowing as he reads it in confusion. Dense lush tropical jungle, palm fronds and ferns, soft flat overcast daylight, no sun, cool and even, not dark, drifting mist, no animals. His face stays toward the camera. Shallow depth of field, cool desaturated cinematic grade, hyperrealistic, 8K.

pieces.caption: ...wait. What's over there?
pieces.prompt: Cinematic continuous shot, vertical 9:16, no cuts. The camera faces a Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, clean-shaven, average build, wearing a plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve cotton T-shirt (plain round neckline, no buttons, no collar) and classic blue jeans, barefoot, and tracks slowly backward with him as he walks slowly forward toward the camera through dense lush tropical jungle -- big palm fronds, wet ferns, thick green foliage and vines all around, no animals. Warm brown skin on his face, neck, forearms and hands. He moves cautiously, slightly ducking and tense, scared, turning his head to look left and right as he advances. About halfway through, he suddenly STOPS DEAD in his tracks, freezing mid-step, his eyes locking onto something off to one side, out of frame. He stares for a beat, then turns and strides off toward it -- walking off to the side and out of the frame, leaving the jungle behind. Soft flat overcast daylight, no sun, no golden light, cool and even, not dark, drifting mist. His face stays visible. Shallow depth of field, cool desaturated cinematic grade, hyperrealistic, 8K.

pieces.caption: No. No, no... there's nothing but ocean.
pieces.prompt: Cinematic continuous shot, vertical 9:16, no cuts. A Latino man with warm brown skin (clearly brown, not pale or white), short dark straight hair, clean-shaven, average build, wearing a plain light-grey crew-neck short-sleeve cotton T-shirt (plain round neckline, no buttons, no collar) and classic blue jeans, barefoot, walks out of the dark jungle through a bright opening and onto a high rocky CLIFF edge, still scared and spooked. Warm brown skin on his arms and neck. He steps to the very edge and stops, looking out at a vast, endless grey storm-churned OCEAN stretching to the horizon far below, big waves crashing on the rocks -- overwhelming open sea, no land, no boats, no rescue. Slowly, in stunned disbelief, he raises both hands and clasps them behind his head, elbows out, his whole body language saying he can't believe what he's seeing. Seen from behind and the side so we see him small against the huge seascape. Overcast sky, no sun, cool desaturated tones, not dark, wind tugging at his clothes and hair, tense and ominous. Cinematic, hyperrealistic, 8K.
